projects.name: BloodClarity
projects.tagline: Blood test interpretation with clinical-grade ML accuracy
projects.description: Upload blood test results and get instant plain-English explanations. Custom ML model achieves 98.8% biomarker extraction accuracy — built in-browser, no data leaves your device.

projects.name: Assay
projects.tagline: COBOL documentation generator — 5-pass AI analysis pipeline
projects.description: Upload COBOL source files and get a complete structured knowledge base in minutes. 5-pass AI pipeline using Claude Opus 4.6 with 1M token context — parses divisions, sections, data items, COPY/CALL chains, and dead code. 52/52 E2E tests passing.
highlights: Parses COPY/CALL chains and dead code

projects.name: Trutina
projects.tagline: Forensic mortgage document analysis in under 60 seconds
projects.description: Six-layer forensic pipeline that detects forged mortgage documents. Cross-references metadata, font inconsistencies, redaction artifacts, and payroll figures across Australian financial institutions.
highlights: Detects font tampering, metadata forgery, redaction artifacts

projects.name: Home Scout
projects.tagline: Privacy-first companion robot — voice, vision, zero internet
projects.description: A home companion robot built on Arduino VENTUNO Q. Combines voice assistant, face recognition, object memory, and autonomous patrol — all running locally. No cloud, no subscriptions, no data leaving your home.

projects.name: Cosmos Collective
projects.tagline: Explore the universe in your browser — 3D solar system, JWST imagery, Kepler exoplanets
projects.description: Multi-spectrum astronomical data exploration platform. 3D solar system showing the vortex motion through space, JWST multi-wavelength imagery in all six filters, and a searchable catalogue of 2,600+ confirmed Kepler exoplanets.

projects.name: BrightClause
projects.tagline: AI contract analysis for M&A due diligence
projects.description: Upload contracts and get structured extraction of obligations, risk levels, and entity relationships. Built for M&A due diligence — surfaces critical clauses and flags unusual terms across complex document stacks.

projects.name: PortPilot
projects.description: Electron desktop app for managing development ports and running apps. See what's running on every port, kill processes, launch services — without touching the terminal.

projects.name: Asset Tracker
projects.tagline: Real-time inventory management across multiple locations
projects.description: Glassmorphism web UI for tracking EUC assets across locations. Excel seed data, barcode scanning, assignment history, and E2E test coverage. Built for Perth enterprise environments.

projects.name: SwanFlow
projects.tagline: Real-time traffic monitoring for Perth with ESP32-CAM hardware
projects.description: End-to-end traffic intelligence system for Perth roads. ESP32-CAM hardware running FOMO object detection counts vehicles in real time. Interactive map shows live congestion across Perth arterial roadways.
highlights: FOMO object detection at the edge
Live congestion map across Perth arterial roadways

projects.name: Cupla Focail
projects.description: A free Irish-English dictionary with 100,000+ entries across 35 categories. Fada-insensitive search so you can type 'ceol' and find 'ceol'. Available as a web app, embeddable widget, REST API, and npm package.
highlights: Available as API, widget, and npm package
